text:
{
  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a multiplayer video game mode.",
      "It is a form of deathmatch or team deathmatch."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has a twist that each time the player scores a kill, their gun is immediately replaced with a more powerful one.",
      "It has a combat knife as the final weapon.",
      "It has small and symmetrical arenas.",
      "It has AFK players as a problem.",
      "It has special bonus weapon drops from defeating bosses."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by players attempting to kill random opponents.",
      "It is characterized by guns cycling through the game's arsenal from weakest to strongest.",
      "It is characterized by near-immediate respawn of the player.",
      "It is characterized by a challenging curve due to later guns being sniper rifles.",
      "It is characterized by the brevity of each round."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for increasing the appeal of games that contain it.",
      "It is used for providing a quick way to complete rounds.",
      "It is used for offering a different experience from typical game modes.",
      "It is used for providing a \"brilliant chaos\" experience.",
      "It is used for providing \"one of the finest highs\" in the game."
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [

      "It affects the player's progress.",
      "It affects the game's balance.",
      "It affects the appeal of games that contain it.",
      "It affects the player's experience."

    "ConsistsOf": [
      "It consists of rounds.",
      "It consists of players starting with an equally weak weapon.",
      "It consists of guns being replaced with more powerful ones.",
      "It consists of a combat knife as the final weapon.",
      "It consists of small and symmetrical arenas."

      "It is part of Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.",
      "It is part of Counter-Strike 2.",
      "It is part of Valorant."

      "It belongs to the Call of Duty series.",
      "It belongs to Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.",
      "It belongs to Counter-Strike 2.",
      "It belongs to Valorant."

    "KnownFor": [
      "It is known for its unique gun replacement mechanic.",
      "It is known for its fast-paced gameplay.",
      "It is known for its brevity of rounds.",
      "It is known for being enjoyable.",
      "It is known for the challenge of using later weapons like sniper rifles."

      "It is associated with first-person shooters.",
      "It is associated with Counter-Strike.",
      "It is associated with Call of Duty.",
      "It is associated with Valorant.",
      "It is associated with Dark Souls."

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それはマルチプレイヤービデオゲームモードです。",
      "それはデスマッチまたはチームデスマッチの一形態です。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは、プレイヤーがキルを獲得するたびに、銃がより強力なものに即座に置き換えられるというひねりがあります。",
      "それは最後の武器としてコンバットナイフを持っています。",
      "それは小さく対称的なアリーナを持っています。",
      "それはAFKプレイヤーを問題として抱えています。",
      "それはボスを倒すことによる特別なボーナス武器ドロップを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは、プレイヤーがランダムな対戦相手を倒そうとすることによって特徴付けられます。",
      "それは、銃がゲームの武器庫を最も弱いものから最も強いものへと循環することによって特徴付けられます。",
      "それは、プレイヤーのほぼ即時のリスポーンによって特徴付けられます。",
      "それは、後半の武器がスナイパーライフルであることによる挑戦的なカーブによって特徴付けられます。",
      "それは、各ラウンドの短さによって特徴付けられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それは、それを含むゲームの魅力を高めるために使用されます。",
      "それは、ラウンドを完了するための迅速な方法として使用されます。",
      "それは、典型的なゲームモードとは異なる体験を提供するために使用されます。",
      "それは、「素晴らしいカオス」体験を提供するために使用されます。",
      "それは、ゲームにおける「最高のハイ」の一つを提供するために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それはCounter-StrikeのMODにあります。",
      "それはCall of Dutyシリーズにあります。",
      "それはCounter-Strike: Global Offensiveにあります。",
      "それはCounter-Strike 2にあります。",
      "それはValorantにあります。"
    ],

      "それはCounter-StrikeのMODで作成されました。"
    ],
    "DevelopedBy": [
      "それはゲーム開発者によって開発されました。"
    ],
    "DevelopedIn": [

      "それはCounter-Strike: Global Offensiveで開発されました。",

    ],
    "CausedBy": [
      "それはプレイヤーがキルを獲得しようとすることによって引き起こされます。",
      "それはプレイヤーがキルされることによって引き起こされます。",
      "それはプレイヤーがAFKすることによって引き起こされます。"
    ],
    "Affects": [

      "それはプレイヤーの進行状況に影響します。",

      "それは、銃がより強力なものに置き換えられることで構成されています。",
      "それは、最後の武器としてコンバットナイフで構成されています。",
      "それは小さく対称的なアリーナで構成されています。"

      "それはCall of Dutyシリーズの一部です。",
      "それはCounter-Strike: Global Offensiveの一部です。",

      "それはValorantに属します。"
    ],

      "それはユニークな銃の交換メカニズムで知られています。",
      "それはペースの速いゲームプレイで知られています。",
      "それはラウンドの短さで知られています。",
      "それは楽しいことで知られています。",
      "それはスナイパーライフルのような後半の武器に適応する挑戦で知られています。"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それは一人称シューティングゲームと関連があります。",
      "それはCounter-Strikeと関連があります。",
      "それはCall of Dutyと関連があります。",
      "それはValorantと関連があります。",
      "それはDark Soulsと関連があります。"
    ],

    ],
    "OccurredIn": [
      "それはCounter-StrikeのMODで発生しました。",
      "それはCall of Dutyシリーズで発生しました。",
      "それはCounter-Strike: Global Offensiveで発生しました。",
      "それはCounter-Strike 2で発生しました。",
      "それはValorantで発生しました。"
    ],

      "unknown"
    ],
    "WonBy": [
      "それはコンバットナイフでキルを獲得することによって勝ちました。",
      "それは最高のティアに到達することによって勝ちました。",
      "それはコンバットナイフをうまく使用したプレイヤーによって勝ちました。"
    ],
    "About": [
      "それはキルを獲得することによって一連の武器を進行することについてです。",
      "それはトップウェポンへのレースについてです。",
      "それはますます強力で難しい武器に適応することの挑戦についてです。",
      "それは急速な武器サイクリングのカオスと楽しさについてです。",
      "それはデスマッチジャンルのユニークなテイクについてです。"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それはデスマッチゲームモードの影響を受けました。",
      "それはチームデスマッチゲームモードの影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それは、それを含むゲームの魅力に影響を与えました。",
      "それは、他のタイトルのゲームモードのデザインに影響を与えました。",
      "それはCounter-Strike: Global Offensiveのプレイヤーの体験に影響を与えました。",
      "それはCall of Dutyのプレイヤーの体験に影響を与えました。",
      "それはValorantのプレイヤーの体験に影響を与えました。"
    ]
  }

IsA: It is a multiplayer video game mode.
It is a form of deathmatch or team deathmatch.
HasA: It has a twist that each time the player scores a kill, their gun is immediately replaced with a more powerful one.
It has a combat knife as the final weapon.
It has small and symmetrical arenas.
It has AFK players as a problem.
It has special bonus weapon drops from defeating bosses.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by players attempting to kill random opponents.
It is characterized by guns cycling through the game's arsenal from weakest to strongest.
It is characterized by near-immediate respawn of the player.
It is characterized by a challenging curve due to later guns being sniper rifles.
It is characterized by the brevity of each round.
UsedFor: It is used for increasing the appeal of games that contain it.
It is used for providing a quick way to complete rounds.
It is used for offering a different experience from typical game modes.
It is used for providing a "brilliant chaos" experience.
It is used for providing "one of the finest highs" in the game.
LocatedIn: It is located in Counter-Strike mods.
It is located in Call of Duty series.
It is located in Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.
BuiltIn: It was built in Counter-Strike mods.
BuiltBy: It was built by game developers.
OriginatedIn: It originated in a Counter-Strike mod.
CreatedBy: It was created by game developers.
CreatedIn: It was created in Counter-Strike mods.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by game developers.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in various first-person shooters.
It was developed in the Call of Duty series.
It was developed in Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.
ProducedBy: It was produced by game developers.
CausedBy: It is caused by players attempting to score kills.
It is caused by players being killed.
It is caused by players AFKing.
Affects: It affects the appeal of games that contain it.
ConsistsOf: It consists of players starting with an equally weak weapon.
It consists of guns being replaced with more powerful ones.
It consists of a combat knife as the final weapon.
It consists of small and symmetrical arenas.
PartOf: It is part of multiplayer video games.
It is part of the Call of Duty series.
It is part of Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.
MemberOf: It is a member of deathmatch game modes.
It is a member of team deathmatch game modes.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the genre of multiplayer video games.
It belongs to the Call of Duty series.
It belongs to Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.
KnownFor: It is known for its unique gun replacement mechanic.
It is known for its fast-paced gameplay.
It is known for its brevity of rounds.
It is known for being enjoyable.
It is known for the challenge of using later weapons like sniper rifles.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with first-person shooters.
It is associated with Call of Duty.
It is associated with Dark Souls.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Call of Duty series.
It occurred in Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.
WonBy: It was won by scoring a kill with the combat knife.
It was won by reaching the highest tier.
It was won by players who successfully use the combat knife.
About: It is about progressing through a series of weapons by scoring kills.
It is about a race to the top weapon.
It is about the challenge of adapting to increasingly powerful and difficult weapons.
It is about the chaos and fun of rapid weapon cycling.
It is about a unique take on the deathmatch genre.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by deathmatch game modes.
It was influenced by team deathmatch game modes.
Influenced: It influenced the appeal of games that contain it.
It influenced the design of game modes in other titles.
It influenced the experience of players in Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.
It influenced the experience of players in Call of Duty.
It influenced the experience of players in Valorant.
